title: Union plays rugby against Karel Theron
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Union Schools in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Union Schools in Graaff-Reinet's junior rugby teams took to the field on 8 May, and played a spirited set of home fixtures against Karel Theron Primêre Skool from neighbouring Middelburg.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Union Schools in Graaff-Reinet's junior rugby teams took to the field on 8 May, and played a spirited set of home fixtures against Karel Theron Primêre Skool from neighbouring Middelburg."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It was a proud day for these young boys, with the u.7A team securing a confident 15-0 victory, while the u.7B side gave it their all in a tough 5-20 contest."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both these games were played in a confident spirit, and good sportsmanship prevailed throughout.","html":"Both these games were played in a confident spirit, and good sportsmanship prevailed throughout."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The u.9A team impressed with a solid 19-10 win and the u.11A boys showed great determination to edge out their opponents 15-10.","html":"The u.9A team impressed with a solid 19-10 win and the u.11A boys showed great determination to edge out their opponents 15-10."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Rounding off the afternoon with flair, the u.13A team delivered a dominant and very strong performance, triumphing 52-7.","html":"Rounding off the afternoon with flair, the u.13A team delivered a dominant and very strong performance, triumphing 52-7."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The excitement and spirit of all these young players were a joy to experience, and Union Schools are confident that these teams have a great future ahead of them.","html":"The excitement and spirit of all these young players were a joy to experience, and Union Schools are confident that these teams have a great future ahead of them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Schools also commended the effort, teamwork and sportsmanship of their opponents from Karel Theron Primary School, as well as their own Union teams.","html":"Union Schools also commended the effort, teamwork and sportsmanship of their opponents from Karel Theron Primary School, as well as their own Union teams."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Union plays rugby against Karel Theron
